title: Mob Loot Variants
description: This mod changes the loot table of mobs that have variants. Cold and warm variants give different amounts of items.
body:
![versions](https://cf.way2muchnoise.eu/versions/1229066.svg)  
![neoforge](https://github.com/thomasglasser/thomasglasser/blob/main/files/badges/cozy/supported/neoforge_64h.png?raw=true) ![quilt](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/supported/quilt_64h.png) ![fabric](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/supported/fabric_64h.png)

This mod changes the loot table of mobs that have variants. Cold and warm variants give different amounts of items.

Cow:  
![](https://i.imgur.com/N9p40Fk.jpeg)

Pig:  
![](https://i.imgur.com/DkGKi9X.jpeg)

Chicken:  
![](https://i.imgur.com/s7j7XFt.jpeg)

[![patreon-singular](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/patreon-singular_64h.png)](https://www.patreon.com/ludwici) [![kofi-singular](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/kofi-singular-alt_64h.png)](https://ko-fi.com/ludwici)
